prophecies.a: 当旧秩序崩塌，大地将翻转，天与地交换位置。这是一个结束，也是一个开始。世界将经历一次彻底的净化与重生，万物的秩序将被重新书写。
prophecies.q_en: Pachacuti: The Overturning of the World
prophecies.a_en: When the old order collapses, the earth will turn over — sky and land will swap places. This is both an ending and a beginning. The world will undergo a thorough purification and rebirth, and the order of all things will be rewritten.

prophecies.q: 第一太阳纪：瓦里·维拉科查·鲁纳
prophecies.a: 第一个太阳纪是瓦里·维拉科查·鲁纳（Wari Wiracocha Runa），即维拉科查之民的时代。这些最初的人类生活在黑暗中，没有法律，没有农业，只有最原始的存在。他们与造物主维拉科查直接相连。这个纪元在一场大洪水中终结。
prophecies.a_en: The first sun age was Wari Wiracocha Runa — the age of Wiracocha's people. These earliest humans lived in darkness, without laws or agriculture, in the most primitive existence. They were directly connected to the creator god Wiracocha. This age ended in a great flood.

prophecies.a: 第二个太阳纪是瓦里·鲁纳（Wari Runa），即圣民的时代。这些人开始穿兽皮衣物，学会了基本的种植，建造简陋的石屋。他们崇拜维拉科查，生活简朴而虔诚。这个纪元也在灾变中结束。
prophecies.a_en: The second sun age was Wari Runa — the age of the holy people. These people began wearing animal skin garments, learned basic farming, and built simple stone dwellings. They worshipped Wiracocha and lived simply and devoutly. This age also ended in catastrophe.

prophecies.a: 第三个太阳纪是普伦·鲁纳（Purun Runa），即野蛮人的时代。人口大量增长，人们分散到各地，建立了村落和部族。纺织、灌溉和金属加工开始出现。但争斗和战争也随之而来。这个纪元在混乱中终结。
prophecies.a_en: The third sun age was Purun Runa — the age of wild people. Population grew greatly, people dispersed across the land, establishing villages and tribes. Weaving, irrigation, and metalworking emerged. But conflict and war followed. This age ended in chaos.

prophecies.a: 第四个太阳纪是奥卡·鲁纳（Auca Runa），即战士的时代。这是一个充满征战和混乱的时代，各部族相互征伐，建造防御工事。社会高度组织化但充满暴力。印加帝国正是在这个纪元末期崛起，试图统一秩序。
prophecies.a_en: The fourth sun age was Auca Runa — the age of warriors. This was an era of conquest and chaos, with tribes warring against each other and building fortifications. Society was highly organized but violent. The Inca Empire rose at the end of this age, seeking to unify order.

prophecies.q: 第五太阳纪与当前时代
prophecies.a: 第五个太阳纪始于印加帝国鼎盛时期，但随着1533年西班牙征服而遭受重创。Q'ero长老相信第五太阳纪正在走向终结，人类将迎来新的帕查库提——一次伟大的转变与净化，旧世界的结构将被替换。
prophecies.q_en: Fifth Sun and the Current Age
prophecies.a_en: The fifth sun age began during the height of the Inca Empire but suffered devastation with the Spanish conquest of 1533. Q'ero elders believe the fifth sun is approaching its end, and humanity will face a new Pachacuti — a great transformation and purification that will replace the structures of the old world.

prophecies.a: 远古预言说，人类自起源起分为两条道路：鹰之民（北方）代表理智、工业和物质；秃鹰之民（南方）代表心灵、直觉和自然。五百年前，鹰之民将压倒秃鹰之民，几乎将其消灭。但在第五个五百年（约2000年起），鹰与秃鹰将有机会在天空中重逢飞翔，世界将恢复平衡。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy of the Eagle and the Condor
prophecies.a_en: An ancient prophecy says humanity split into two paths from its origin: Eagle People (North) represent intellect, industry, and the material; Condor People (South) represent heart, intuition, and nature. Five hundred years ago, Eagle People would overwhelm Condor People, nearly destroying them. But in the fifth five-hundred-year period (from c. 2000), Eagle and Condor will have the chance to fly together again, and the world will return to balance.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 自2000年以来，南北美洲原住民文化复兴运动确实显著加速。厄瓜多尔（2008年）和玻利维亚（2009年）将自然权利写入宪法，2006年玻利维亚选出首位原住民总统埃沃·莫拉莱斯。但全球范围内物质主义与精神回归的平衡远未达成。
prophecies.verdict_en: Since 2000, indigenous cultural revival movements across the Americas have indeed accelerated significantly. Ecuador (2008) and Bolivia (2009) enshrined rights of nature in their constitutions, and Bolivia elected its first indigenous president Evo Morales in 2006. However, a global balance between materialism and spiritual return remains far from achieved.

prophecies.q: 塔里帕伊帕查：重逢时代
prophecies.a: Q'ero长老传承的预言说，帕查库提之后将迎来「塔里帕伊帕查」（Taripay Pacha），即「重新与自我相遇的时代」。在这个时代，人类将重新连接被遗忘的灵性维度，恢复与帕查妈妈（大地母亲）和宇宙的和谐关系。这不是世界的终结，而是意识的跃升。
prophecies.q_en: Taripay Pacha: The Age of Meeting Ourselves Again
prophecies.a_en: Q'ero elder tradition prophesies that after the Pachacuti will come the 'Taripay Pacha' — the 'Age of Meeting Ourselves Again.' In this era, humanity will reconnect with forgotten spiritual dimensions and restore harmonious relations with Pachamama (Mother Earth) and the cosmos. This is not the end of the world, but an elevation of consciousness.

prophecies.a: 印加传统预言说，末代印加王的灵魂将重新回到人间。当西班牙人处死印加王图帕克·阿马鲁时，他的身体被分成碎片埋在帝国四方。预言说这些碎片终将重新聚合，印加王将以新的形式回归，带领安第斯人民恢复荣光。这个预言被称为「因卡里」（Inkarri）神话。
prophecies.a_en: Inca tradition prophesies the spirit of the last Inca king will return to the world. When the Spanish executed Inca king Tupac Amaru, his body was dismembered and buried in the four quarters of the empire. The prophecy says these pieces will eventually reunite, and the Inca king will return in a new form to lead the Andean people back to glory. This prophecy is known as the 'Inkarri' myth.

prophecies.a: 当人类对大地母亲帕查妈妈（Pachamama）失去敬畏，过度索取而不回馈时，大地将以地震、洪水和火山爆发作为回应。安第斯山的冰川将消退，河流将干涸，古老的平衡将被打破。只有重新学会与大地互惠（Ayni），灾难才会停止。
prophecies.a_en: When humanity loses reverence for Mother Earth Pachamama, taking excessively without giving back, the earth will respond with earthquakes, floods, and volcanic eruptions. Andean glaciers will retreat, rivers will dry up, and the ancient balance will be broken. Only by relearning reciprocity with the earth (Ayni) will the disasters cease.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 安第斯冰川确实在加速消退。秘鲁的奎尔卡亚冰帽（Quelccaya）自1980年代以来退缩速度加快10倍。玻利维亚查卡塔亚冰川（Chacaltaya）于2009年完全消失。2023年联合国报告指出热带安第斯冰川已丧失超过30%的面积。与此同时，安第斯地区地震和极端天气事件频率显著增加。
prophecies.verdict_en: Andean glaciers are indeed retreating at accelerating rates. Peru's Quelccaya ice cap has retreated 10 times faster since the 1980s. Bolivia's Chacaltaya glacier completely disappeared in 2009. A 2023 UN report noted tropical Andean glaciers have lost over 30% of their area. Meanwhile, earthquake and extreme weather event frequency in the Andean region has increased significantly.

prophecies.a: 古老的太阳节印提·拉伊米（Inti Raymi）在被禁止数百年后将重新回归。当太阳节再次在库斯科的萨克赛华曼举行时，标志着印加精神传统的复苏，古老的智慧将重新传播到世界各地。
prophecies.a_en: The ancient sun festival Inti Raymi, banned for hundreds of years, will return. When the sun festival is held again at Sacsayhuaman in Cusco, it will mark the revival of Inca spiritual traditions, and ancient wisdom will spread across the world once more.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1944年，秘鲁演员兼导演Faustino Espinoza Navarro根据印加传统重新编排了印提·拉伊米仪式，在库斯科萨克赛华曼遗址首次现代复演。此后每年6月24日持续举办，已成为秘鲁最大的文化节日之一，每年吸引数十万游客，被列入秘鲁国家文化遗产。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1944, Peruvian actor-director Faustino Espinoza Navarro reconstructed the Inti Raymi ceremony based on Inca traditions, performing the first modern revival at Sacsayhuaman in Cusco. It has been held annually on June 24 ever since, becoming one of Peru's largest cultural festivals, attracting hundreds of thousands of visitors yearly, and listed as Peruvian national cultural heritage.

prophecies.q: 莫索克预言：新人类的诞生
prophecies.a: Q'ero长老预言，帕查库提完成后，世界上将出现「莫索克」（Mosoq）——新人类。他们不再被恐惧和贪婪驱动，而是能感知活体能量场（Kawsay Pacha），与自然和宇宙直接沟通。第六太阳纪将是莫索克的时代，也是整合物质与精神的时代。
prophecies.q_en: Mosoq Prophecy: Birth of New Humans
prophecies.a_en: Q'ero elders prophesy that after the Pachacuti is complete, 'Mosoq' — new humans — will appear in the world. They will no longer be driven by fear and greed, but will be able to perceive the living energy field (Kawsay Pacha) and communicate directly with nature and the cosmos. The sixth sun age will be the age of Mosoq — an era of integrating the material and spiritual.

prophecies.q: 白人兄弟的到来与离去
prophecies.a: 预言说，有一天白皮肤的人将从海上来到安第斯，他们自称是维拉科查的后裔。他们将带来巨大的破坏，摧毁印加人的庙宇和城市，压迫原住民数百年。但他们的统治终将结束，安第斯人民将重新站起来。
prophecies.q_en: Coming and Going of the White Brothers
prophecies.a_en: The prophecy says one day white-skinned people will arrive from the sea to the Andes, claiming descent from Wiracocha. They will bring great destruction, demolish Inca temples and cities, and oppress indigenous peoples for hundreds of years. But their rule will eventually end, and the Andean people will rise again.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1532年，弗朗西斯科·皮萨罗率领西班牙征服者到达秘鲁，印加人最初以为他们是维拉科查神的使者。1533年，西班牙人处死印加王阿塔瓦尔帕，摧毁印加帝国。随后近500年的殖民统治中，原住民遭受系统性压迫。20世纪以来，安第斯原住民权利运动持续发展，2006年玻利维亚选出首位原住民总统。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1532, Francisco Pizarro and Spanish conquistadors arrived in Peru; the Inca initially believed them to be emissaries of the god Wiracocha. In 1533, the Spanish executed Inca emperor Atahualpa and destroyed the Inca Empire. During nearly 500 years of colonial rule, indigenous peoples suffered systematic oppression. Since the 20th century, Andean indigenous rights movements have grown, with Bolivia electing its first indigenous president in 2006.

prophecies.q: 知识守护者将走出高山
prophecies.a: Q'ero长老预言，当帕查库提的时刻来临，隐居在高山中的知识守护者将走出山区，向世界传播古老的智慧。他们曾因保护传统而远离文明世界，但在新时代开始时，他们必须分享所知，帮助人类度过转变期。
prophecies.q_en: Knowledge Keepers Will Descend from the Mountains
prophecies.a_en: Q'ero elders prophesied that when the moment of Pachacuti arrives, the knowledge keepers hidden in the high mountains will emerge to share ancient wisdom with the world. They had withdrawn from civilization to protect their traditions, but when the new age begins, they must share what they know to help humanity through the transition.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1959年以来，Q'ero长老开始与外界接触。1990年代，以Don Manuel Quispe和Don Andrés Espinoza为代表的Q'ero祭司开始系统性地向西方世界传授安第斯灵性传统，通过人类学家Juan Núñez del Prado和Alberto Villoldo等人的著作广泛传播。此后Q'ero长老定期前往欧美举办工作坊和仪式。
prophecies.verdict_en: From 1959 onward, Q'ero elders began contact with the outside world. In the 1990s, Q'ero priests including Don Manuel Quispe and Don Andrés Espinoza began systematically teaching Andean spiritual traditions to the Western world, disseminated through works by anthropologists Juan Núñez del Prado and Alberto Villoldo. Q'ero elders now regularly travel to Europe and North America for workshops and ceremonies.
